name: Oven-Dried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Lightly oil a cookie sheet or baking pan with olive oil and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Slice tomatoes crosswise into 1-inch slices.
4. Pack the tomato slices tightly together on the prepared pan, filling it as much as possible.
5. Drizzle the tomato slices lightly with olive oil, then sprinkle with salt and pepper and fresh herbs if desired (use thyme, rosemary, oregano, or garlic, alone or in combination).
6. Roast for 45 minutes to 1 hour. The tomatoes should be shriveled and dehydrated without burning. The flavor will become more intense and rich the longer they are left in the oven.
